response.step_by_step_log: Reviewed the entire video. The video is a promotional showcase for merchandise featuring four Hololive Justice characters. All audio consists of the characters speaking English to the audience, with instrumental background music playing throughout. No vocal songs were identified, thus no web searches were conducted.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for Hololive Justice merchandise, featuring character dialogue explaining the items and an announcement for an upcoming concert. Throughout the video, instrumental music plays in the background, but there are no vocal performances.

scenes.description: Intro and presentation of the Sergeant Smokey Multi Case.
Presentation of the 3D Acrylic Stands for all characters.
Presentation of Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame's Paper Knife & Acrylic Stand.
Presentation of Gigi Murin's Hand In Cushion.
Presentation of Cecilia Immergreen's Pouch & Socks.
Presentation of Raora Panthera's Pencil Case & Keychain.
Outro, concluding remarks, and announcement for the upcoming Justice 3D concert.
